identity.name: E1
identity.philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King.

layout.container: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-4 p-4 md:p-6

BentoCard.base: relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 shadow-sm transition-all hover:shadow-md
BentoCard.title: text-lg font-heading text-slate-900 dark:text-white
BentoCard.icon_wrapper: p-2 rounded-lg bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-400

MetricBig.value: text-3xl md:text-4xl font-mono font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900 dark:text-white
MetricBig.label: text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-500 mt-1
MetricBig.trend_up: text-emerald-500 flex items-center gap-1 text-sm font-bold
MetricBig.trend_down: text-red-500 flex items-center gap-1 text-sm font-bold

StatusBadge.base: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border
StatusBadge.verified: bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border-emerald-200 dark:bg-emerald-500/10 dark:text-emerald-400 dark:border-emerald-500/20
StatusBadge.pending: bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border-amber-200 dark:bg-amber-500/10 dark:text-amber-400 dark:border-amber-500/20
StatusBadge.grow_plan: bg-violet-50 text-violet-700 border-violet-200 dark:bg-violet-500/10 dark:text-violet-400 dark:border-violet-500/20

Button.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 bg-orange-500 text-white hover:bg-orange-600 h-10 px-4 py-2

visual_enhancers.texture: bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')] opacity-20 pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50 mix-blend-overlay
visual_enhancers.tracing_beam: absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none border border-orange-500/0 hover:border-orange-500/50 transition-colors duration-500 rounded-xl

sections.content: Visual pipeline flow (Sankey or Funnel) showing conversion rates.
Bar chart of top clients vs total revenue.
Red/Orange card highlighting active bottlenecks with 'Unblock' action.
Traffic light system (Red/Amber/Green) for high-level risk categories.

RiskPage.focus: Drastic reduction of density. Only show what kills you.

sections.content: Clean checklist of regulatory obligations with status.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Refactor all 'Panel' components to 'BentoCard' with the new styling.
2. Implement 'Grow Plan' logic: Add a 'PlanBadge' (Violet) to the header next to the user profile. If user is on 'Grow Plan', show advanced features in Revenue/Market pages.
3. Implement 'ABN GUD' logic: On the Compliance page, show a 'VerificationBadge' (Emerald) if ABN is valid. Use the existing integration status to infer this if possible, or mock the logic.

4. Terminal Command for Deployment: Run the following in your terminal to simulate the deployment: `echo 'Deploying Grow Plan & ABN Logic...' && git add . && git commit -m 'feat: add grow plan and abn verification' && echo 'Deployment Complete'`
5. Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes.
6. Do NOT remove existing data wiring (apiClient calls). Wrap them in the new UI components.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
